name: Saudi Aramco PIM — Vendor Pre-qualification & Schedule Q
name_ar: أرامكو السعودية PIM — التأهيل المسبق للموردين
standard: Saudi Aramco Pre-qualification Information Memorandum (PIM) + 9COM Schedule Q + Aramco Approved Vendor List (AVL)
regulator: Saudi Aramco — Contracting Department + Inspection Department
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that gate every tender response to an Aramco package on the proper PIM / Schedule Q pre-qualification: contractor and major subcontractors must be on the Aramco Approved Vendor List (AVL) for the relevant work category (civil / mechanical / electrical / piping / coatings / instrumentation), Schedule Q safety-management questionnaire completed within validity window, IKTVA local-content score disclosed and meeting the package minimum, Nitaqat band Green or above, and prior-project performance evaluation references attached.
description_ar: تفعيل قواعد التحقق للتأهيل المسبق للموردين في أرامكو — قائمة الموردين المعتمدين AVL، استبيان السلامة Schedule Q، درجة IKTVA، ونطاق نطاقات.
